channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Trial begins for group accused of antifa links in shooting at Texas immigration detention center
item.description: Federal prosecutors are describing those who participated in a July 4 gathering outside a Texas immigration detention center that left a police officer wounded as antifa members intent on a “violent campaign” to influence U.S. policy.

item.title: Northeast US scrambles to clear piles of snow as new storm descends on the region
Legal advocates seek to halt CBP policy pressuring unaccompanied children to self-deport
